steps.title: Complete the second clause
steps.content: After "and," the sentence has a new plural subject: "its theoretical linguistic properties." That clause needs a finite plural verb to say what those properties do in relation to traits of Nilotic descendants.

steps.title: Reject clause fragments
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C are participial forms, so they cannot serve as the main verb. Choice D creates a relative clause modifying "properties" but still leaves no main verb. The remaining choice is the finite plural verb the clause needs. The answer is B.
